prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（原理科）最低位次约2739→1707→1526→2730→2015，整体呈波动走势，2022–2023年明显前移后2024年大幅后移至2730名，2025年回升至约2015名；近3年波动幅度较大，2025年基准约2015名；本省物理类计划2021年149人、2022年149人、2023年156人、2024年158人、2025年159人，逐年小幅递增；2026年计划167人，较2025年扩招约5%，扩招对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科2026年主榜排名第13位（Top20），近年排名稳定在第11–13位，属国内顶尖高校行列；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学术不端事件（论文数据存疑等），但2025年声誉偏正面（报考热情回升）；抖音热度排名第29位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上；历史投档异常方面，2022年曾在多省出现断档，2023年有投档线异常信号，2024–2025年关注度中等，对报考心理有一定滞后影响；拥有23个A-及以上学科，其中工商管理A+、生态学A+、中国语言文学A、数学A、物理学A、生物学A、基础医学A、公共卫生与预防医学A、药学A、马克思主义理论A等；临床医学A-、计算机科学与技术A-、法学A-等，学科实力全面强劲。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程、临床医学等专业持续高热推荐；法学、金融/财经分化观望；本省2026年普通高考总人数约39.2万，按历史比例估算物理类约26.9万人，较2025年26.0万人增加约3.3%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争；中山大学位于广东广州，与广西相邻，地域偏好较强；该校在广西招生计划占比较稳定，物理类近年约150–167人，属外省招生规模较大的985高校之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次约2015名、2026年计划扩招约5%（推高位次数字增大）、本省物理类考生增加约3.3%（加剧竞争）、学校声誉偏负面但抖音热度尚可等因素；扩招与考生增加效应基本对冲，无充分修正依据，预测最低位次约2076名，区间1827–2325名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (formerly Science) was approximately 2739 → 1707 → 1526 → 2730 → 2015, showing a fluctuating trend. Rankings significantly moved forward in 2022–2023, then dropped sharply to 2730 in 2024, and rebounded to about 2015 in 2025. The fluctuation range has been large in the past three years, with a baseline of about 2015 in 2025. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 149 in 2021, 149 in 2022, 156 in 2023, 158 in 2024, and 159 in 2025, increasing slightly year by year. The 2026 plan is 167, an increase of about 5% compared to 2025, which somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Ranked 13th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking (Top 20), with stable rankings between 11th and 13th in recent years, belonging to the top domestic universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (questionable paper data, etc.), but the 2025 reputation was slightly positive (increased application enthusiasm). Douyin popularity ranks 29th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure. Regarding historical admission anomalies, there were gaps in multiple provinces in 2022, abnormal admission line signals in 2023, and moderate attention in 2024–2025, with a lagging effect on application psychology. It has 23 A- or above disciplines, including A+ in Business Administration and Ecology, A in Chinese Language and Literature, Mathematics, Physics, Biology, Basic Medicine, Public Health and Preventive Medicine, Pharmacy, and Marxist Theory, and A- in Clinical Medicine, Computer Science and Technology, and Law, showing comprehensive and strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and Clinical Medicine continue to be highly recommended. Law and Finance/Economics are divided and wait-and-see. The total number of candidates for the 2026 provincial general college entrance examination is about 392,000, with an estimated Physics Category of about 269,000 based on historical proportions, an increase of about 3.3% from 260,000 in 2025, intensifying competition due to the expanded candidate pool. Sun Yat-sen University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, adjacent to Guangxi, with strong regional preference. The university's enrollment plan in Guangxi is relatively stable, with Physics Category around 150–167 in recent years, making it one of the 985 universities with a larger enrollment scale outside the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of about 2015, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 5% (pushing the ranking number higher), the increase in provincial Physics Category candidates by about 3.3% (intensifying competition), the slightly negative university reputation but moderate Douyin popularity, and other factors, the effects of enrollment expansion and candidate increase roughly offset each other. Without sufficient correction basis, the predicted minimum ranking is about 2076, with a range of 1827–2325.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 1827–2325, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as a stretch and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 1800), focus on sprinting for top majors like Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Program) and Computer Science. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 2300), prioritize Tier 2 majors such as Electronic Information and Artificial Intelligence, and ensure Tier 3 majors like Business Administration and Economics as stable choices.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (formerly Liberal Arts) was approximately 385 → 370 → 237 → 320 → 279, showing an overall forward trend. It peaked at 237 in 2023, then slightly moved back to 320 in 2024, and rebounded to about 279 in 2025. The fluctuation range over the past three years is about 80 places, with a baseline of about 279 in 2025. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 45 in 2021, 45 in 2022, 38 in 2023, 36 in 2024, and 36 in 2025, showing a year-on-year reduction trend. The 2026 plan is 32, a reduction of about 11.1% compared to 2025, a significant reduction, leading to intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Ranked 13th (Top 20) in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with a stable position between 11th and 13th in recent years, belonging to the top domestic universities. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents; in 2025, the reputation was somewhat positive. Douyin popularity ranking is 29th (relatively hot). In terms of historical admission anomalies, there were gaps in multiple provinces in 2022, and abnormal admission line signals in 2023, which have some impact on application psychology. It has 23 A- or above disciplines, including A+ in Business Administration and Ecology, A in Chinese Language and Literature, Mathematics, Physics, and Biology, and A- in Law, Applied Economics, Sociology, Philosophy, Chinese History, and Foreign Languages and Literatures, highlighting strong humanities and social sciences strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is recommended but differentiated; Chinese Language and Literature/Chinese is recommended; Teacher Training/Education is differentiated and wait-and-see; Finance/Economics is differentiated and wait-and-see. The total number of candidates for the 2026 provincial general college entrance examination is about 392,000, with an estimated 123,000 in History Category based on historical proportions, an increase of about 3.3% compared to 119,000 in 2025. Sun Yat-sen University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, adjacent to Guangxi, with a strong regional preference. The enrollment plan for History Category in Guangxi has been reduced from 45 to 32 in recent years, showing a clear reduction trend.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of about 279, the 2026 plan reduction of about 11.1% (pushing the ranking number smaller, intensifying competition), the increase in provincial History Category candidates by about 3.3% (intensifying competition), and the somewhat negative university reputation, the reduction effect is significant, leading to a forward shift in ranking. The predicted minimum ranking is about 260, with a range of 210–310.
